title: Ping!
description: A simple mod that alerts players when they are mentioned in chat.
body:
*Ping!* is a simple mod that, when installed, will alert the user when they are mentioned in chat. This was created based on this feature in many IRC clients. It has a few default sounds, which can be changed in the configuration file "config/ping.cfg".

Information here is not kept up to date. Please visit [the wiki](https://ftb.fandom.com/wiki/Ping!).
